reviews.comment:
Le doy la estrella porque la atención fue buena, amable y eficaz. Llene el tanque de una moto a inyección con Infinia, y la nafta era de TAN mala calidad que me comio mas de medio tanque hasta la axion que está llegando al peaje yendo a capital, cuando sali de tecnópolis con un tanque de V-power y llegue a Chascomús con apenas menos de medio tanque. Un desastre la calidad del combustible, no podia pasar de 100km/h.

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it one star because the service was good, friendly, and efficient. I filled the tank of my fuel-injected motorcycle with Infinia, and the gasoline was of such poor quality that it consumed more than half a tank before I reached the Axion station near the tollbooth on the way to the city. I had left Tecnópolis with a full tank of V-Power and arrived in Chascomús with barely less than half a tank. The fuel quality was a disaster; I couldn't go faster than 100 km/h.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTcV9XbmRREAE

reviews.comment:
Estaba cerrado el YPF Store despues de 8 meses de pandemia y un fin de semana largo de turismo. Los baños un desastre. Seguiremos haciendo nuestra parada en el YPF de Dolores que siempre esta impecable.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF Store was closed after eight months of the pandemic and a long weekend of tourism. The bathrooms were a disaster. We'll continue making our stop at the YPF in Dolores, which is always spotless.
